macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Mixed on Monday Amid Oil Price Surge and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 edged up less than 0.1% to 6,881.62, Dow fell 0.1% to 48,904.78, Nasdaq rose 0.4% to 22,748.86, and Russell 2000 gained 0.9% to 2,655.94. Markets swung from losses driven by higher oil prices on Iran war worries to small gains, with oil and defense stocks rallying while airlines and cruise lines declined.[1]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: China Report Alleges U.S. Seized $30 Billion in Global Crypto Assets
items.summary: A Chinese state-backed report released on Feb. 26 claims the U.S. government seized over $30 billion in virtual currency assets worldwide from 2022 to 2025, citing cases involving cybercrime figure Chen Zhi and Binance founder Zhao Changpeng totaling $20 billion.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MIT Researchers Develop AI Framework for Multimodal Cell Biology Analysis
items.summary: MIT engineers created a machine-learning framework that distinguishes shared and unique data across cell measurement modalities like transcriptomics and chromatin accessibility, improving understanding of cellular states. The model uses a shared representation space and two-step training to handle complex data overlaps.

items.title: New Journal Launched to Integrate AI into Environmental Research
items.summary: A new scientific journal calls for deeper AI integration in environmental science, highlighting its potential to process vast datasets for pollution tracking, climate modeling, and precision agriculture. Editors argue AI can detect hidden patterns and simulate complex systems more precisely than traditional methods.

items.title: CEOs Rank AI as Top Business Risk Surpassing Geopolitics and Cyber Threats
items.summary: For the first time, CEOs identify artificial intelligence as the greatest business risk, ahead of geopolitical turmoil, Federal Reserve policies, tariffs, and cyberattacks. This shift underscores growing concerns over AI's rapid evolution and implications.

items.title: Canada Announces Funding for Alberta Businesses to Advance AI and Machine Learning
items.summary: The Government of Canada is supporting Alberta companies through the Regional Artificial Intelligence Initiative to enhance AI, machine learning, and drone technologies for civilian and defense applications. The investment aims to boost economic resilience and global competitiveness.

items.title: Weekly AI in Healthcare Update Highlights Regulatory Clearances and Trials
items.summary: Key developments include FDA and TGA clearances for imaging AI tools from Qure.ai and Optellum, high accuracies in AI for psychiatric disorders, and expansions in telehealth and metabolic trials. Reports also note advances in brain health scoring and privacy-conscious screening.

items.title: Expert Consensus Identifies Top AI Uses in Education for 2026
items.summary: Leading applications are AI-driven personalized tutoring, adaptive learning, assessment feedback, and teacher workload reduction, backed by UNESCO, OECD, and recent reviews. These enable real-time feedback and free educators for high-value student interactions.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Announces Indie World Showcase for March 3, 2026
items.summary: Nintendo will air a 15-minute Indie World showcase on March 3 at 2pm GMT, featuring upcoming indie games for Switch systems. The event promises new announcements amid a busy schedule of presentations.

items.title: Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered Launches Today on PS5, Xbox, and PC
items.summary: The remastered version of the 2003 action-adventure game releases on March 3, featuring updated visuals, camera improvements, character skins, and Photo Mode. It aims to attract both fans and newcomers to its gothic world.

items.title: World of Warcraft: Midnight Expansion Launches on PC Today
items.summary: Blizzard's latest World of Warcraft expansion, Midnight, releases on March 3, introducing new regions, endgame activities, player housing, and narrative content. It is expected to boost subscriptions and reaffirm the game's dominance.

items.title: Windstorm: The Legend of Khiimori Releases Today on PC
items.summary: The latest entry in the Windstorm franchise launches on March 3, offering an open-world adventure experience distinct from competitive titles this week.

items.title: Indie Gaming Highlights for March 2-8 Include Multiple March 5 Releases
items.summary: A new indie gaming roundup covers releases like HAM: The Game, Humanica, Scott Pilgrim EX, and notes a surge of games on March 5 including Bungie's Marathon, amid post-Steam Next Fest activity.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
